title: Statewide Kickoff Call
summary: A short call to align on priorities, upcoming events, and how to get involved.
detailsMarkdown:
## What to expect

- Quick updates from around the state
- A clear list of next actions
- Time for questions

**Note:** This is a sample event in the default JSON provider. Replace with your real events under `src/data/events.json`.

title: Community Meetup (North Region)
summary: Meet neighbors, hear updates, and get plugged into volunteer roles.
detailsMarkdown:
## Agenda

- Welcome + introductions
- Local updates
- Volunteer opportunities

Bring a friend.
